children.name: test_invalid_password_returns_400
tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='ReqRes demo API changed behaviour: POST /login with a known email and wrong password now returns 200 + token instead of 400. The _meta.context field is 'legacy_success', confirming this is a read-only demo limitation — not a real auth success. Track: https://reqres.in — update if API behaviour is restored.', strict=True)

children.name: test_create_user[TC_USR_CREATE_001-data0]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_CREATE_001', 'description': 'Create user with valid name and job', 'payload': {'name': 'Alice Johnson', 'job': 'QA Engineer'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['name', 'job', 'id', 'createdAt']}

children.name: test_create_user[TC_USR_CREATE_003-data2]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_CREATE_003', 'description': 'Create user with special chars in job title', 'payload': {'name': 'Riya Das', 'job': 'Sr. QA Engineer - Automation'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['name', 'job', 'id', 'createdAt']}

children.name: test_create_user[TC_USR_CREATE_005-data4]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_CREATE_005', 'description': 'Create user with long name and job title', 'payload': {'name': 'Christopher Alexander Williamson', 'job': 'Principal Software Development Engineer in Test'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['name', 'job', 'id', 'createdAt']}

children.name: test_put_update_user[TC_USR_PUT_001-data0]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PUT_001', 'description': 'PUT — update name and job for user 2', 'user_id': 2, 'payload': {'name': 'Janet Updated', 'job': 'Senior Designer'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'expected_name': 'Janet Updated', 'expected_job': 'Senior Designer'}

children.name: test_put_update_user[TC_USR_PUT_002-data1]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PUT_002', 'description': 'PUT — replace with completely different name and job', 'user_id': 2, 'payload': {'name': 'Arjun Sharma', 'job': 'QA Automation Lead'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'expected_name': 'Arjun Sharma', 'expected_job': 'QA Automation Lead'}

children.name: test_put_update_user[TC_USR_PUT_003-data2]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PUT_003', 'description': 'PUT — update user 3', 'user_id': 3, 'payload': {'name': 'Emma Williams', 'job': 'SDET II'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'expected_name': 'Emma Williams', 'expected_job': 'SDET II'}

children.name: test_patch_update_user[TC_USR_PATCH_001-data0]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PATCH_001', 'description': 'PATCH — update only name', 'user_id': 2, 'payload': {'name': 'Patched Name Only'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'check_field': 'name', 'check_value': 'Patched Name Only'}

children.name: test_patch_update_user[TC_USR_PATCH_002-data1]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PATCH_002', 'description': 'PATCH — update only job', 'user_id': 2, 'payload': {'job': 'Patched Job Only'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'check_field': 'job', 'check_value': 'Patched Job Only'}

children.name: test_patch_update_user[TC_USR_PATCH_003-data2]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_USR_PATCH_003', 'description': 'PATCH — update both name and job for user 3', 'user_id': 3, 'payload': {'name': 'Both Fields', 'job': 'Both Updated'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'check_field': 'name', 'check_value': 'Both Fields'}

children.name: test_login_scenarios[TC_AUTH_LOGIN_001-data0]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_AUTH_LOGIN_001', 'description': 'Valid login — expect 200 and token', 'payload': {'email': 'eve.holt@reqres.in', 'password': 'cityslicka'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'expect_token': True, 'expect_error': False}

children.name: test_login_scenarios[TC_AUTH_LOGIN_002-data1]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_AUTH_LOGIN_002', 'description': 'Wrong password — ReqRes demo returns 200 for known emails (xfail: legacy_success)', 'payload': {'email': 'eve.holt@reqres.in', 'password': 'wrongpassword'}, 'expected_status': 400, 'expect_token': False, 'expect_error': True, '_known_issue': 'ReqRes demo API returns 200+token for known emails regardless of password. xfail documented in test_data_driven.py.'}

children.name: test_login_scenarios[TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003-data2]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003', 'description': 'Unknown email — expect 400 and error', 'payload': {'email': 'unknown@ghost.com', 'password': 'anypassword'}, 'expected_status': 400, 'expect_token': False, 'expect_error': True}

children.name: test_create_post[TC_POST_CREATE_001-data0]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_POST_CREATE_001', 'description': 'Create post with userId 1', 'payload': {'userId': 1, 'title': 'My First Post', 'body': 'This is the body of my first post.'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['userId', 'title', 'body', 'id']}

children.name: test_create_post[TC_POST_CREATE_002-data1]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_POST_CREATE_002', 'description': 'Create post with userId 5', 'payload': {'userId': 5, 'title': 'Another Post', 'body': 'Another post body content here.'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['userId', 'title', 'body', 'id']}

children.name: test_create_post[TC_POST_CREATE_003-data2]
parameters: {'id': 'TC_POST_CREATE_003', 'description': 'Create post with long title and body', 'payload': {'userId': 2, 'title': 'A Very Long Title That Tests The Limits Of The Title Field In The API', 'body': 'A very long body that simulates a real blog post with multiple sentences. It goes on and on to test how the API handles larger payloads gracefully.'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['userId', 'title', 'body', 'id']}

children.name: test_login_error_schema_wrong_password
tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='ReqRes demo API returns 200+token for known emails with wrong password (_meta.context='legacy_success'). Expected 400 + error schema. Known read-only demo limitation — not a real auth success. Track: https://reqres.in — update if API behaviour is restored.', strict=True)
